315780.name: Favorite Human 횄혘횂짖횄혗횂혵횄혗횂짢
315780.letter:
You know what's honestly annoying?

How easily you became part of my everyday thoughts 횄혘횂째횄혗횂혺횄혗횂혱횄혗횂짯

Like...

somehow random things keep reminding me of you.

Songs.
Late-night silence.
Even stupid memes.

And despite all our chaos...

you still became one of the safest people in my life.

Which feels suspicious honestly.

Also please remember:

if I bully you too much...
that's unfortunately my version of affection 횄혘횂짖횄혗횂혵횄혗횂짢

820441.name: Midnight Problem 횄혘횂째횄혗횂혺횄혗횂혣횄혗횂혲
820441.letter:
I still think it's funny...

how we started as random conversations.

And now somehow...

you became one of those people I genuinely wait to talk to.

Even on exhausting days.
Even during weird moods.

You're strangely comforting.

Which is honestly rude.

And yes...

this is your official reminder to stop overthinking every tiny thing 횄혘횂째횄혗횂혺횄혗횂혱횄혗횂짯

Some people stay.

You don't always have to panic about losing them 횄혘횂짖횄혗횂혵횄혗횂짢
